# FocusRunner AI — llms.txt
# Optimized for LLM/AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, Claude, etc.)
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org/

## Site Info
> FocusRunner is an AI patient acquisition system for med spa acquirers and elective healthcare practices.
> We deploy automated landing pages, 24/7 AI chatbots, SMS/email follow-up sequences, and CRM pipelines in 7 days.
> $2,500 setup + $2,500/mo. 15+ qualified leads in 30 days — guaranteed.

## Key Pages

### Homepage
- URL: https://focusrunner.io/
- Description: AI patient acquisition system for med spa acquirers. Deploy automated lead capture, nurture, and booking in 7 days.

### Blog — Med Spa Acquisition & AI Marketing
- URL: https://focusrunner.io/#blog
- Description: In-depth guides on med spa acquisition, valuation, AI marketing, and patient acquisition costs.

### State of Med Spa Acquisition 2026 (Original Research)
- URL: https://focusrunner.io/blog/state-of-med-spa-acquisition-2026.html
- Description: Data-driven M&A analysis: valuation multiples (3.2x median SDE), AI acquisition premium (0.5-1.0x), geographic hotspots. Data from 200+ practices.

### How to Acquire a Med Spa — Complete Guide
- URL: https://focusrunner.io/blog/how-to-acquire-a-med-spa.html
- Description: Full guide: sourcing deals, valuation at 2.5-4.5x SDE, due diligence checklist, SBA financing, post-acquisition AI system deployment.

### Med Spa Patient Acquisition Costs — 2026 Benchmarks
- URL: https://focusrunner.io/blog/med-spa-patient-acquisition-costs.html
- Description: Cost breakdown by channel: Google Ads, Meta, organic SEO, AI. Industry benchmarks. Top-quartile practices acquire at <$150/lead.

### AI Marketing for Medical Aesthetics
- URL: https://focusrunner.io/blog/ai-marketing-medical-aesthetics.html
- Description: Four-layer AI stack: chatbot capture, SMS/email nurture, ad optimization, predictive retention. 3-5x more consultations per marketing dollar.

### Med Spa Valuation Methods
- URL: https://focusrunner.io/blog/med-spa-valuation-methods.html
- Description: SDE multiples, EBITDA multiples, factors that drive value up or down. AI acquisition systems add 0.5-1.0x to sale price.

### Lead Capture / Free Audit
- URL: https://focusrunner.io/#start
- Description: Submit your practice details. We design a custom AI automation workflow with a free acquisition audit.

## Contact

## Structured Data
- Organization schema with sameAs links to all social profiles
- FAQPage schema with 5 Q&As about the service
- Article schema on all 6 blog posts with Author (Person) credentials
- BreadcrumbList schema on all blog pages
- WebSite schema with SearchAction
